videos.title: Merciless Evil Toxic MtG Gameplay w Baddie & Aims & Michael  Worst Possible Commander Show 156
videos.description:
Today's Commander battle features popular Twitch streamers @BaddieStreams @AimsTV_  and my buddy, Michael, and they get the worst possible CovertGoBlue experience!  Today's commanders are Raffine, Jhoira, Will, and Kenrith.  
More Worst Possible Commander Show https://youtu.be/9F-RmDycKo0?si=Nqqo7uEEb7sMuRXQ

Deck lists
Thanks @decktechsfordecks for the Will deck, CGB overshot the power level a bit.
https://youtu.be/aFcGWnW7b6Y?si=E2-eO5AzuSJklp_m

Michael: https://moxfield.com/decks/e4EA5yMCgkCf8bMweDpszA
Aims: https://moxfield.com/decks/1LB0ISBPQUyXHMtQ3hqZ8A
CGB: https://moxfield.com/decks/bjaNo5xd206auET9Yl7LjQ
Baddie: https://moxfield.com/decks/CsDUzuBCsk2YydHJYm7hDA

videos.title: Betor Brawl Deck Review  What are they thinking?
videos.description:
A new Brawl precon has dropped in the store, but does it hold up?  CGB plays and upgrades the Betor, Ancestor's Voice Brawl deck.
